'''鈭歞-v-p''' ('''kadavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pentamerize|pentamerize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pentamerize|pentamerize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavap|thidavap]] || [[word:jidavap|jidavap]] || [[word:shidavap|shidavap]] || [[word:kidavap|kidavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavap|thuthudavap]] || [[word:jujudavap|jujudavap]] || [[word:shushudavap|shushudavap]] || [[word:kukudavap|kukudavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavap|thudavap]] || [[word:judavap|judavap]] || [[word:shudavap|shudavap]] || [[word:kudavap|kudavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavap|thudavap]] || [[word:judavap|judavap]] || [[word:shudavap|shudavap]] || [[word:kudavap|kudavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedavap|thedavap]] || [[word:jedavap|jedavap]] || [[word:shedavap|shedavap]] || [[word:kedavap|kedavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodavap|thothodavap]] || [[word:jojodavap|jojodavap]] || [[word:shoshodavap|shoshodavap]] || [[word:kokodavap|kokodavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavap|thodavap]] || [[word:jodavap|jodavap]] || [[word:shodavap|shodavap]] || [[word:kodavap|kodavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavap|thodavap]] || [[word:jodavap|jodavap]] || [[word:shodavap|shodavap]] || [[word:kodavap|kodavap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]] || [[word:davap|davap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙davap|th忙davap]] || [[word:j忙davap|j忙davap]] || [[word:sh忙davap|sh忙davap]] || [[word:k忙davap|k忙davap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavap|thathadavap]] || [[word:jajadavap|jajadavap]] || [[word:shashadavap|shashadavap]] || [[word:kakadavap|kakadavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadavap|thadavap]] || [[word:jadavap|jadavap]] || [[word:shadavap|shadavap]] || [[word:kadavap|kadavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadavap|thadavap]] || [[word:jadavap|jadavap]] || [[word:shadavap|shadavap]] || [[word:kadavap|kadavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadavap|shadavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadavap|goshadavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadavap|gokishadavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadavapn眉|shadavapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadavapnkn眉|goshadavapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavapn眉|gokishadavapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadavapsh毛|shadavapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadavapnksh毛|goshadavapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadavapsh毛|gokishadavapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavapro|shadavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavapnkro|goshadavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavapro|gokishadavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavapmu|shadavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavapnkmu|goshadavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavapmu|gokishadavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadavapsher|shadavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadavapnksher|goshadavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadavapsher|gokishadavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadavapng|shadavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadavapnkng|goshadavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadavapng|gokishadavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadavapya|shadavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadavapnkya|goshadavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadavapya|gokishadavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadavapyam|shadavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadavapnkyam|goshadavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadavapyam|gokishadavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavapn眉sh毛|shadavapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavapnkn眉sh毛|goshadavapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavapn眉sh毛|gokishadavapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavapn眉ro|shadavapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavapnkn眉ro|goshadavapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavapn眉ro|gokishadavapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavapn眉mu|shadavapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavapnkn眉mu|goshadavapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavapn眉mu|gokishadavapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavapsh毛n眉|shadavapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavapnksh毛n眉|goshadavapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavapsh毛n眉|gokishadavapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavapsh毛ro|shadavapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavapnksh毛ro|goshadavapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavapsh毛ro|gokishadavapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavapsh毛mu|shadavapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavapnksh毛mu|goshadavapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavapsh毛mu|gokishadavapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavapron眉|shadavapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavapnkron眉|goshadavapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavapron眉|gokishadavapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavaprosh毛|shadavaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavapnkrosh毛|goshadavapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavaprosh毛|gokishadavaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavapromu|shadavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavapnkromu|goshadavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavapromu|gokishadavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavapmun眉|shadavapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavapnkmun眉|goshadavapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavapmun眉|gokishadavapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavapmush毛|shadavapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavapnkmush毛|goshadavapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavapmush毛|gokishadavapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavapmuro|shadavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavapnkmuro|goshadavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavapmuro|gokishadavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
